tasks.prompt: Write 5 original English sentences using E-mail Writing.
tasks.hindiPrompt: E-mail Writing का उपयोग करते हुए 5 नए वाक्य लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: Dear Sir, thank you for your email. I will not be able to attend this meeting. Please send me the report. I will reply soon. This email is for important information.

tasks.prompt: Write a short paragraph (5-6 lines) using E-mail Writing.
tasks.hindiPrompt: E-mail Writing का उपयोग करते हुए एक छोटा पैराग्राफ लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: Please check the attachment. I need your help. Thanks and regards. I am working on this project. Please give this priority.

tasks.prompt: Translate into English: "मैंने आपका संदेश पढ़ लिया है।"
tasks.hindiPrompt: नीचे दिए गए वाक्य का अंग्रेज़ी अनुवाद करें।

tasks.prompt: Correct this sentence: "I will reply soon yesterday."
tasks.hindiPrompt: इस वाक्य में गलती ठीक कीजिए।

tasks.prompt: Write a short 4-line dialogue using E-mail Writing.
tasks.hindiPrompt: E-mail Writing का उपयोग करते हुए एक संवाद लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: This email was sent by mistake. Please ignore this. I need to know the time of the meeting. Please schedule a conference call.
